command: bash -c mkdir -p tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx && uv run python -u -m arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_task_types --format json > tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx/task_types.json && uv run python -u -m arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_costs --format json --detail full > tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx/costs.json && uv run python -u -m arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_tasks --format json --detail short > tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx/tasks.json && uv run python -u -m arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_metrics --format json --detail full > tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx/metrics.json && uv run python -u -m arf.scripts.aggregators.aggregate_suggestions --format json --detail full > tasks/t0002_baseline_evaluation/ctx/suggestions.json
